title: smt2/smtbmc: Fix mathsat counterexample VCD dump crash
body:
How to reproduce:

issue.v

```v
module topmodule(input clk);
	assert property (0);
endmodule
```

`yosys -ql issue.yslog -p 'read_verilog -formal issue.v; prep -top topmodule -nordff; dump -o issue.il; write_smt2 issue.smt2' && yosys-smtbmc -s mathsat -t 1 --dump-vcd issue.vcd issue.smt2`

I don't know why there are empty strings/lines in smtio read only when mathsat counterexamples are being generated. It might be better to reject this PR and start an issue to find the root cause.
